revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

Removing from [[Category:11]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Supercategory 2]]" to ""
Text replacement - "refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized" to "qq"
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=5th-century_Japanese_monarchs here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
